MODULE: cosmos.cicd.github_actions
FILE: cosmos/cicd/github_actions.py (577 lines)
CATEGORY: cicd

DESCRIPTION: cosmos GitHub Actions Integration

"Version control? I invented that! I just forgot which version..."

GitHub Actions workflow management via the GitHub API.

CLASSES:
- GitHubActionsManager(CICDProvider): GitHub Actions integration for CI/CD management.

Features:
- Workflow CRUD oper
  Methods: async def list_pipelines(self, repository: str) -> List[Pipeline]
  Methods: async def get_pipeline(self, pipeline_id: str) -> Optional[Pipeline]
  Methods: async def get_workflow(self, repository: str, workflow_id: str) -> Optional[Dict[str, Any]]
  Methods: async def create_pipeline(self, pipeline: Pipeline) -> bool
  Methods: async def update_pipeline(self, pipeline: Pipeline) -> bool
  Methods: async def delete_pipeline(self, pipeline_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def delete_workflow(self, repository: str, workflow_path: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def trigger_pipeline(self, pipeline_id: str, branch: str='main', variables: Dict[str, str]=Non
